text.title: typescript-react-2026 Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure converting a feature brief into a validated App-Router spec.

step.name: map-routes
step.action: Expand the canonical app/ folder per route: layout.tsx, page.tsx, loading.tsx, error.tsx, not-found.tsx where applicable.
step.output: routes: array of {path, files[]} with default boundary="server-default".

step.name: classify-boundary
step.input: Per-file state needs from the brief (does the file use hooks / browser APIs / event handlers?).
step.action: For each file, set boundary. server-default unless the file uses client capabilities; then "use-client". Refuse to mark layout files as "use-client".

step.name: declare-actions
step.action: For each mutation, declare an action with name, mutates=true, input_schema (Zod schema name).

step.name: declare-revalidate
step.input: actions from step 3 + page routes from step 1.
step.action: For each mutating action, set revalidate.kind ∈ {path, tag} and target. Pick "path" when the action affects a single route; "tag" when multiple unrelated routes consume the same tagged fetch.
step.output: actions[].revalidate filled for every action where mutates=true.

step.name: set-tsconfig
step.input: Current tsconfig.json + the project's risk tolerance.
step.action: Set strict=true, noUncheckedIndexedAccess=true, exactOptionalPropertyTypes=true. verbatimModuleSyntax=true is recommended unless the codebase is a dual-publish library.
